title: Vale CEO Says Metals Demand Is Robust Despite Iran Conflict
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官表示，尽管伊朗冲突，金属需求依然强劲
summary: Vale SA, the world’s top iron ore producer, sees no evidence of war-related demand destruction in global metals markets and has experienced swelling margins as the Iran conflict disrupts raw-material flows, said Chief Executive Officer Gustavo Pimenta.

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival After Plunge: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 暴跌后芯片股在人工智能贸易复苏中反弹：市场总结
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid renewed enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and bets that a solid economy will keep powering Corporate America.

title_cn: 伊朗、以色列发出停止升级信号后油价小幅走高
summary: Oil edged higher after Israel and Iran signaled they would refrain from further escalation after a day of hostilities between the two sides.

title: JPMorgan Shops 15% Yield Debt for Oil Driller Boosted by Trump
title_cn: 摩根大通为特朗普提振的石油钻探公司购买 15% 的收益率债务
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is in talks with investors to refinance a nearly $1 billion loan at a 15% interest rate for Sable Offshore Corp., a Trump administration-supported oil driller, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Pulte is 'Woefully Under Qualify' To Be Intelligence Director Says Riggleman
title_cn: 里格曼表示，普尔特“严重不符合”担任情报总监的资格
summary: Denver Riggleman, Former-Republican Congressman from Virginia and CEO of RIIG Technology joins to discuss the latest from Congress and gave his thoughts on the promotion of Bill Pulte. At least seven Senate Democrats would have to vote in favor in order to re-authorize Section 702, but they have threatened to block any extension if the White House doesn’t withdraw Pulte’s appointment.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Fled From Bearish Oil Fund at a Record Pace Last Week
title_cn: 上周投资者以创纪录的速度逃离看空石油基金
summary: An exchange-traded product that profits when oil prices fall had its biggest weekly outflow on record as several buffers that had helped keep rallies in check begin to fade.

title: Lots of Heartburn Over The Anti-Weaponization Fund Says Rep. Comer
title_cn: 众议员科默表示，反武器化基金令人心痛
summary: Congressman James Comer, Chairman of the House Oversight Committee and Republican representing Kentucky's 1st District joined Balance of Power to discuss the latest on Reconciliation, the DOJ Fund and the likelihood of FISA lapsing at the end of the week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bank Workers Swept Up in Criminal Probe Test Chile Secrecy Rules
title_cn: 银行工作人员卷入刑事调查测试 智利保密规则
summary: The June arrests of bank workers accused of ties to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua criminal organization has reignited debate over Chile’s financial secrecy rules, which are among the strictest in the world.

title: Blue Owl Fund Hit by Redemptions Sells $500 Million Bonds
title_cn: 遭受赎回打击的 Blue Owl 基金出售 5 亿美元债券
summary: One of Blue Owl Capital Inc.’s private credit funds that capped redemptions earlier this year raised $500 million in the investment-grade bond market on Monday.

title: Rare-Earth Developer Aclara Seeks US Backing for Chilean Project
title_cn: 稀土开发商 Aclara 寻求美国支持智利项目
summary: The company seeking to build Chile’s first rare-earth mine is in talks with US International Development Finance Corporation as the Trump administration moves to loosen China’s grip on critical minerals.

title: Amazon to Raise C$14 Billion in Record Canadian Dollar Bond Sale
title_cn: 亚马逊将发行创纪录的加元债券筹集 140 亿加元
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is set to sell C$14 billion ($10 billion) of investment-grade bonds, the largest corporate bond offering on record in the currency, in a deal that drew around twice that amount in demand.

title: Millennium’s Grunfeld Says Schonfeld Trying to ‘Coerce’ Move
title_cn: 千禧年的格伦菲尔德称舍恩菲尔德试图“强制”搬迁
summary: Millennium Management portfolio manager Adam Grunfeld asked a New York judge to throw out a suit filed against him by Schonfeld Strategic Advisors, saying the rival hedge fund group was essentially trying to pressure him to join.

title: Vanguard’s Malloy Says Muni Yields Bolster Second-Half Outlook
title_cn: 先锋集团的马洛伊表示，穆尼的产量提振了下半年的前景
summary: Attractive yields and strong credit fundamentals are setting the municipal bond market up for a solid second half of the year, said Paul Malloy, the head of municipals at The Vanguard Group Inc.

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止威胁会谈的袭击
summary: Heather Conley, Nonresident Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute joined discuss the recent escalation in Iran as well as the  development in the Ukraine war. She said that despite Ukraine's military wins, she expects Putin to keep the war going at great cost. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rising Dollar Swings Threaten to Dent Resilient Carry Trades
title_cn: 美元波动加剧可能会削弱套利交易的弹性
summary: Rising dollar volatility is endangering a currency-trading strategy that had been a steady winner in recent months.

title: Nestle’s Longtime PE Partner Drops Out of Bidding for Perrier
title_cn: 雀巢的长期私募股权合作伙伴退出对巴黎水的竞购
summary: Nestle SA’s long-time private equity partner, PAI Partners, has dropped out of the bidding for the consumer giant’s water business, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Zepto Publicly Files for Planned $1 Billion India IPO
title_cn: Zepto 公开申请计划 10 亿美元的印度 IPO
summary: Rapid-commerce firm Zepto Ltd. has filed an updated draft prospectus for an initial public offering, marking a key step toward a potential listing of one of India’s fastest-growing consumer internet companies.

title: Fertilizer Prices in US Drop to Level Last Seen Before Iran War
title_cn: 美国化肥价格跌至伊朗战争前水平
summary: Prices for a key nitrogen fertilizer have dropped dramatically, giving up all of the soaring gains as the conflict in Iran upended global supply chains for the crop nutrient.

title: SpaceX IPO Countdown Begins | Open Interest 6/8/2026
title_cn: SpaceX IPO倒计时开始 |未平仓合约 6/8/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Markets look past Iran tensions as Mike Wilson and Jensen Huang bolster the bull case. Apple eyes an AI-powered reset. Intel surges on reports Google will tap it for millions of AI chips. Plus, SpaceX counts down to the biggest IPO ever, and Ross Hamilton joins Bloomberg Open Interest to says the space economy is already powering life on Earth. And Al Rabil joins with his 20-year real estate super cycle call. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BofA Warns It’s Time to ‘Take Profits’ as Red Flags Multiply
title_cn: 美银警告危险信号增多，是时候“获利了结”了
summary: Investors should exercise caution regarding US stocks as an increasing number of “bear market signposts” point to an approaching top, according to Bank of America Securities.

title: Treasuries Pare Drop in Oil-Driven Move Tied to Iran War
title_cn: 与伊朗战争相关的石油驱动举措导致美国国债跌幅收窄
summary: Treasuries pared declines, pulling two-year yields back from a more than 15-month high, as reports of a ceasefire between Israel and Iran eased the upward pressure on oil prices.

title: Mercuria’s First-Half Profit Jumped 88% on Commodity Shocks
title_cn: 受大宗商品冲击影响，摩科瑞上半年利润猛增 88%
summary: Mercuria Energy Group enjoyed an 88% jump in first-half profit, putting it on track for one of its best-ever annual results as the Hormuz crisis creates huge opportunities for commodity traders.

title: Buyer Flips London Mega Mansion for £56 Million Mark Up
title_cn: 买家以 5600 万英镑加价出售伦敦巨型豪宅
summary: The mystery buyer who acquired a mansion in London’s Regent’s Park at the end of 2024 has sold the property for about £195 million ($260 million) in one of the UK’s highest value sales of all time.

title: Dollar Is Best Bet in New Global Regime of High Rates, BMO Says
title_cn: BMO表示，美元是新的全球高利率制度下的最佳选择
summary: Betting on continued US dollar strength is the cleanest way for foreign-exchange traders to take a position on a new regime of higher rates and inflation, according to BMO Capital Markets.

title: Strategy Resumes Buying Bitcoin After Rare Sale Roils Crypto
title_cn: 在稀有销售扰乱加密货币后策略恢复购买比特币
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. resumed buying Bitcoin a week after a rare token sale by the digital asset treasury company roiled the crypto market.

title: Giant Oil Supertanker Orders Eclipse Record Set in 2008
title_cn: 巨型石油超级油轮订单刷新 2008 年创纪录
summary: The world’s shipowners have placed orders for a record number of new oil supertankers, surpassing a boom back in 2008 that ultimately led to a glut and a collapse in rates.

title: Drahi Reaches €20 Billion Deal to Sell Phone Carrier SFR
title_cn: Drahi 达成 200 亿欧元出售电话运营商 SFR 的协议
summary: Billionaire Patrick Drahi has reached an agreement to sell French mobile carrier SFR to a consortium of rival telecommunications firms, in a deal that values the company €20.4 billion ($23.5 billion) and will test regulators’ tolerance for consolidation.

title: Private Share Marketplace Hiive Shops Equity as IPO Boom Nears
title_cn: 随着 IPO 热潮临近，私人股票市场 Hiive 购买股票
summary: The Hiive Co., an online platform for trading shares in pre-public companies, recently held talks with investors about a secondary stock sale that would have valued the firm at about $780 million, according to a document seen by Bloomberg.

title: SpaceX IPO Fuels Space Economy Buzz
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股引发太空经济热潮
summary: SpaceX is just days from Wall Street's biggest IPO ever. And as capital pours into the Space Economy, the opportunities go beyond rocketships. Space exploration yields critical infrastructure for plenty of Earth-bound industries, like agriculture and drug research. Ross Hamilton, the COO of Space Network and the author of "Everything is Flying" joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how space technology already runs modern life on Earth and why a SpaceX IPO could reshape far more than the space industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'No Momentum in Labor Market' Says LinkedIn's Kory Kantenga
title_cn: LinkedIn 的 Kory Kantenga 表示，“劳动力市场没有动力”
summary: Kory Kantenga, head of economics, Americas at LinkedIn, said that the labor market has 'no momentum,' but maintains that it is too early to tell if it is the impact of artificial intelligence.  Kantenga said that recent college grads are feeling the impact as companies reduce entry level opportunities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Investors Tepid About New AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新人工智能平台态度不温不火
summary: Apple investors gave a tepid reception to the next generation of its AI platform. The new Apple Intelligence system, underpinned by Google technology, was unveiled during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Unveils Next Generation of AI Platform, Including New Siri
title_cn: 苹果推出下一代人工智能平台，包括新 Siri
summary: Apple Inc. unveiled the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, including an update to its Siri digital assistant, part of a bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market.  Apple Inc. investors gave a tepid reception to the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, which is key to the company’s bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports on Apple’s unveiling of the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
title_cn: FTX 联合创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 申请特朗普赦免
summary: FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire.

title: Cipher Sells Junk Debt for Amazon-Tied Data Center Project
title_cn: Cipher 为亚马逊数据中心项目出售垃圾债务
summary: Cipher Digital Inc. is planning to raise $810 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to Amazon.com Inc.

title: Here Are the Key Takeaways From Apple WWDC
title_cn: 以下是 Apple WWDC 的主要要点
summary: Here are the biggest takeaways from Apple Inc.’s annual developers conference keynote:

title: German Police Investigate Arson Attack at Power Substation
title_cn: 德国警方调查变电站纵火案
summary: German police and state prosecutors are investigating a suspected arson attack on a substation in southern Germany that affected a hospital and tens of thousands of homes and businesses on Monday.

title: Apple Investors Give Lukewarm Reaction to New Siri, AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新的 Siri 和人工智能平台反应冷淡
summary: Apple Inc. investors gave a tepid reception to the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, which is key to the company’s bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market.

title: What Apple's 2025 iPhone App of the Year Founders Want From Siri
title_cn: Apple 2025 年度 iPhone 应用创始人希望 Siri 提供什么
summary: As Apple kicks off WWDC in Cupertino, the spotlight is turning to inclusive design. Melissa Azari and Helene Nørlem are the co-founders of Denmark-based Tiimo, a visual planning app that was crowned Apple's iPhone App of the Year. They join Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" from Cupertino, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Early Stage Investing in the Age of Huge Pre-IPO Rounds
title_cn: 巨额 Pre-IPO 轮次时代的早期投资
summary: Kindred Ventures has raised $355 million for its latest deep tech and robotics funds, fresh capital which comes as the firm's previous vintage hits the top 1% of its class. Kindred Ventures Managing Partner and founder Steve Jang, joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Unveils New AI Platform and Siri Upgrades
title_cn: 苹果推出新的人工智能平台和 Siri 升级
summary: Apple Inc. unveiled the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, including an update to its Siri digital assistant, part of a bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market. Ed Ludlow reports from Cupertino, California where the company's Worldwide Developers Conference is underway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Developers Hope for Big Leaps From Apple's AI
title_cn: 开发者希望苹果人工智能能够实现巨大飞跃
summary: Paul Hudson is a software developer and the creator of Hacking with Swift, a platform that trains people to develop on the Apple ecosystem. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" from in Cupertino to discuss why he is hoping for some "great APIs" from Apple. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expectations From Apple’s Big AI, Siri Launch
title_cn: 对苹果大人工智能 Siri 的期待
summary: Carolina Milanesi, Creative Strategies president and principal analyst, joins Ed Ludlow in Cupertino, California to discuss what happens next after Apple rolls out an overhauled version of the Siri digital assistant, and the importance of having the AI embedded into the consumer's devices. She joins on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Big AI, Siri and Software Launch | Bloomberg Tech 6/8/2026
title_cn: 苹果的大人工智能、Siri 和软件发布 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 8 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss what to expect out of Apple's developer conference in Cupertino as the iPhone maker is set to unveil a revamped Siri. Plus, Nvidia and SK Hynix partner up on next-generation AI memory chips with a multi-year deal, and SpaceX gets ready to go public this week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside a Brain-Chip Startup in China
title_cn: 中国脑芯片初创公司内部
summary: Brain-computer interfaces could dramatically alter how humans interact with technology. Startups around the world, including in China, are racing to get their devices approved for commercial use.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Is Well Oversubscribed With Orders Closing Wednesday
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 超额认购，订单将于周三截止
summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering is well oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand builds for a potentially record-setting debut.

title: Intel Gains on Report That Google Will Use It to Make Chips
title_cn: 有报道称谷歌将使用英特尔制造芯片，英特尔股价上涨
summary: Intel Corp. shares rose the most in a month after the Information reported that Alphabet Inc.’s Google will rely on it for more than 3 million specialized AI chips in 2028.

title: Apple Investors Look for AI Overhaul to Power Next Leg of Gains
title_cn: 苹果投资者寻求人工智能改革以推动下一阶段的收益
summary: Apple Inc. investors have spent nearly two years clamoring for the iPhone maker to make a big splash with artificial intelligence. Their wait may finally be coming to an end this week at the company’s annual Worldwide Developers Conference.

title: Docusign Shares Drop After Full-Year Guidance Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 全年指引令投资者失望后 Docusign 股价下跌
summary: Docusign's shares declined amid a broadly negative market day following the company's full-year guidance. Allan Thygesen, CEO of Docusign, discussed the company's AI-powered intelligent agreement management platform, highlighting strong adoption with 40,000 customers currently live on the platform. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chicago’s Clout Takes Another Hit as Bears Plan Move to Indiana
title_cn: 随着熊队计划搬到印第安纳州，芝加哥的影响力再次受到打击
summary: Ken Griffin and his Citadel financial empire left Chicago for Florida in 2022. Boeing Co. said it would relocate its headquarters to Virginia around the same time. Now the Chicago Bears, the city’s iconic football team, say they’re moving across the state line to Indiana.

title: Apple’s Revamped AI Smashes Against Down Market
title_cn: 苹果改进后的人工智能冲击低迷的市场
summary:
Expectations are running high for Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference, where the company is expected later Monday to unveil the biggest overhaul of Siri in years, including a chatbot-style interface and deeper integration across the iPhone, iPad and Mac.
Bloomberg Tech co-Host Ed Ludlow discusses his expectations for the conference and how developments in Siri could impact the rest of the AI space. He also addresses investor expectations for the upcoming SpaceX IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: When Should Your Kid Get a Smartphone? Scientists Have an Answer
title_cn: 您的孩子应该什么时候获得智能手机？科学家给出了答案
summary: Thirteen. At the earliest.

title: Brain Implants Are Unlocking a New Human-Machine Reality
title_cn: 大脑植入物正在解锁新的人机现实
summary: The brain has emerged as a new frontier in medical technology. Bloomberg Primer explores where the next neurotechnology advances will lead.

title: Susquehanna’s Head of Prediction Markets on Market-Making
title_cn: Susquehanna 做市预测市场主管
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Jeremy Maletz, Susquehanna's head of macro trading and prediction markets, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to talk about his firm's partnership with Kalshi and how Susquehanna bridges the gap between prediction markets and large institutional investors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Redemption Angst Spills Into Private Equity
title_cn: 赎回焦虑蔓延至私募股权
summary: Blackstone is looking to sell more than $2 billion of its stakes in private investment funds by bundling the exposure into bonds for investors. Sridhar Natarajan discusses the angst spilling into private equity on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Can't Young People Find Jobs?
title_cn: 年轻人为何找不到工作？
summary: For recent college graduates, the unemployment rate is reaching recession levels. But you shouldn’t blame AI, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist and economist Allison Schrager. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Shares Slide After AI Offering Leaves Investors Unimpressed
title_cn: 人工智能产品让投资者不为所动，苹果股价下跌
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook arrives at the Apple Worldwide Developers Conference at Apple Park campus in Cupertino, California on June 8.

title: Wall Street Preps for the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 华尔街为 SpaceX IPO 做准备
summary: SpaceX is heading for the biggest IPO ever. Bloomberg’s Bailey Lipschultz and Sridhar Natarajan join Bloomberg Open Interest to break down how Wall Street is preparing for the historic debut. Demand is already huge, but the real question is whether SpaceX’s massive offering helps reopen the IPO market, or just makes it even harder for everyone else. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vale CEO Sees No Demand Destruction in Metals Markets
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官认为金属市场需求不会受到破坏
summary: Vale SA Chief Executive Officer Gustavo Pimenta says he sees no evidence of demand destruction in global metal markets despite war in the Middle East. In fact, he sees growth in demand around the world. He speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close To Call As Fujimori's Lead Narrows
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，藤森领先优势缩小
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as conservative Keiko Fujimori’s razor-thin lead over leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez narrowed with votes still being counted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Urges Thune to Fire US Senate Rules Referee ‘Immediately’
title_cn: 特朗普敦促图恩“立即”解雇美国参议院规则裁判
summary: Donald Trump called on Senate Majority Leader John Thune to fire the Senate’s top rules keeper after one of her decisions thwarted the president’s efforts to attach voter identification legislation to a budget package.

title: Germany and France Pull Plug on Next-Generation Jet Project
title_cn: 德国和法国终止下一代喷气机项目
summary: The German government said it agreed with France to halt a €100 billion ($115 billion) joint fighter-jet project after failing to overcome persistent cross-border disagreements and multiple delays since its initiation almost a decade ago.

title: Trump to Attend New York Knicks Game Monday at Madison Square Garden
title_cn: 特朗普将于周一在麦迪逊广场花园观看纽约尼克斯队的比赛
summary: President Donald Trump is planning to attend Game 3 of the NBA Finals as his hometown team, the New York Knicks, host the San Antonio Spurs — one of the city’s hottest sports tickets in years.

title: Kenya High Court Upholds Impeachment of Ruto’s Former Deputy
title_cn: 肯尼亚高等法院维持对鲁托前副手的弹劾
summary: A Kenyan high court upheld the impeachment of President William Ruto’s former deputy almost two years ago, even though it found the process hadn’t been held in a fair manner.

title: Trump Border Chief Warns New York ICE Surge Is ‘Coming’
title_cn: 特朗普边境局长警告纽约 ICE 激增“即将到来”
summary: The Trump administration has drawn up a plan to surge US Immigration and Customs Enforcement personnel to New York City, a move that threatens to escalate tensions with New York Governor Kathy Hochul over the president’s migrant crackdown.

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close to Call as Leftist Sánchez Nudges Ahead
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，左翼桑切斯领先
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez nudged ahead of conservative Keiko Fujimori with votes still being counted.

title: UN Says Children Are Dying in Cuba Because of Strict US Sanctions
title_cn: 联合国表示，由于美国的严格制裁，古巴儿童正在死亡
summary: Tighter US sanctions on Cuba have led to a spike in infant mortality and plummeting survival rates for child cancer patients, the United Nations warned in one of its strongest rebukes of Washington’s pressure campaign against the island.

title: Bolivia’s President Signs Law Enabling Tougher Protest Crackdown
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统签署法律加强镇压抗议活动
summary: Bolivia’s embattled President Rodrigo Paz signed a measure that clears the way for a more aggressive crackdown on anti-government protests that have rocked the South American country for more than five weeks.

title: Swiss Lawmakers Tackle Foie Gras Appetite After Activist Push
title_cn: 瑞士立法者在活动人士推动下解决鹅肝食欲问题
summary: Swiss lawmakers want to reduce foie gras imports and keep the option of prohibiting them on the table if tougher labeling rules don’t curb demand for the controversial delicacy within five years.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: After the US and Israel began their war with Iran on Feb. 28, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia Hezbollah was quick to join the fray, firing rockets and drones into Israel. Officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive Hezbollah, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border.

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon identified some of China’s biggest companies including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. as entities that support the Chinese military, in a move that risks provoking new friction with the government in Beijing.

title: Italy Won’t Take Sides on Paschi, Says It’s All About the Money
title_cn: 意大利不会在帕斯基问题上选边站，表示一切都是为了钱
summary: Italy’s Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti indicated the government won’t interfere in any battle for control of Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, saying price will determine whether Banco BPM SpA or Intesa Sanpaolo SpA prevail.

title: Biden’s Defense Chief Austin Says US Navy Could Open Hormuz
title_cn: 拜登的国防部长奥斯汀表示美国海军可以打开霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Former Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said the US Navy is capable of prying open the Strait of Hormuz but that an extended military operation to free up the vital oil and gas waterway would be costly and require allies.

title: Honeywell Expects to Absorb Iran Impact as War De-Escalates
title_cn: 随着战争升级，霍尼韦尔预计将吸收伊朗的影响
summary: Honeywell International Inc. reaffirmed its guidance ahead of the planned spinoff of its aerospace business, saying it expects to absorb the near-term financial impact from the war in Iran.

title: Former US Defense Secretary Austin Doesn't Think China Will Take Taiwan by Force
title_cn: 美国前国防部长奥斯汀不认为中国会武力占领台湾
summary: Former US Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin talks about the war in Iran, a possible peace deal, the importance of NATO and how a battle over Taiwan between the US and China could impact the global economy. He speaks to Bloomberg's London Bureau Chief Ruth David at the HSBC Gulf Cooperation Council Exchanges Conference in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Clashes in Pakistan-Controlled Kashmir Leave Seven Dead
title_cn: 巴控克什米尔冲突造成七人死亡
summary: Seven people were killed, while many others were injured in a clash between the recently proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee and the police on Sunday in the city of Rawalakot in the Pakistan-controlled region of Kashmir.

title: Prospects for Job Seekers Seen Worsening, NY Fed Survey Says
title_cn: 纽约联储调查显示，求职者的前景正在恶化
summary: Americans’ view of the labor market grew somewhat more pessimistic in May, with the perceived prospects for job seekers hitting their lowest point this year, according to a Federal Reserve Bank of New York survey released Monday.

title: India Seeks Protection From Future Trade Probes in US Deal
title_cn: 印度在美国协议中寻求保护免受未来贸易调查
summary: India has sought assurance from the US that it will not face any investigations under Section 301 once a trade agreement is signed between the two nations, according to an official from the South Asian country.

title: Pashinyan Wins Third Term as Armenia Backs Shift Toward West
title_cn: 亚美尼亚支持向西方转移，帕希尼扬赢得第三个任期
summary: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claimed victory in parliamentary elections as voters overwhelmingly backed the South Caucasus country’s turn toward the West and away from Russia.

title: G7 Ministers Seek Joint Fertilizer Action as War Roils Supplies
title_cn: 七国集团部长寻求联合化肥行动，应对战争扰乱供应
summary: Group of Seven nations are weighing joint action to protect farmers and bolster food security as the war in the Middle East disrupts fertilizer supplies.

title: Iran Halts Latest Israel Strikes, Trump Urges Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗停止以色列最新打击，特朗普敦促停火
summary:
Iran declared an end to its latest strikes against Israel, after tit-for-tat attacks that prompted President Donald Trump to call for a halt to fighting.

The escalation followed renewed fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon, which remains a sticking point in peace negotiations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LA Mayor Race Flips as Socialist Beats Reality TV Star Pratt
title_cn: 社会主义者击败真人秀明星普拉特，洛杉矶市长竞选发生逆转
summary: Democratic incumbent Mayor Karen Bass and Democratic City Councilmember Nithya Raman will advance to the runoff in November for Los Angeles mayor, Decision Desk HQ projects.

title: Denmark’s F-35 Bill Overruns Plan by $2.2 Billion, Auditors Find
title_cn: 审计员发现丹麦的 F-35 法案超出计划 22 亿美元
summary: Denmark’s purchase of F-35 fighter jets will be about 14 billion kroner ($2.2 billion) more expensive than planned, according to the national auditors, who criticized the Nordic country’s government for giving inadequate information to parliament.

title: Xi Pledges Deeper Ties With Kim While Avoiding Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 习近平承诺与金正恩深化关系，同时避免核问题
summary: President Xi Jinping vowed to expand China’s trade, agriculture and technology cooperation with North Korea, while avoiding public mentions of its neighbor’s nuclear program in a meeting with Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang.
